task:
Open /home/user/Documents/colorful.png in GIMP.

Convert the image to grayscale color mode and export it as PNG to /home/user/Documents/colorful_gray.png. The output must be in single-channel grayscale (mode 'L') and must keep the original 600x400 dimensions.

verification.description: Output grayscale PNG file exists at /home/user/Documents/colorful_gray.png
Output image is in grayscale (L) mode
